cobblemon.species.grogu.name: Grogu
cobblemon.species.grogu.desc: A mysterious, Force-sensitive being with unprecedented power. Despite its young appearance, it has survived great dangers. Once hidden during a great conflict, it now travels with a protective guardian as a foundling of Mandalore.
